india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday
india_trends.summary: Sensex and Nifty ended lower in a volatile session as profit booking in banking stocks erased early gains. Despite easing volatility and supportive global cues, caution persists due to geopolitical uncertainties, while technical indicators suggest a bullish trend with near-term consolidation likely.

india_trends.title: Arohan Financial Services in final lap to file DRHP for Rs 1400 crore IPO
india_trends.summary: Arohan Financial Services plans a Rs 1,400 crore IPO, combining fresh issue and OFS, amid improving microfinance sector conditions. With better asset quality, stable growth outlook, and recovering loan portfolios, the company aims to capitalise on renewed investor confidence.

india_trends.summary: Federal Reserve Bank of New York ​President John Williams said Thursday that the Middle East war is already driving up inflationary pressures, and uncertainty over the outlook is ​limiting how much the central bank can say about what's next for interest rate policy.

india_trends.summary: Flexibility could aid execution in weak markets, though smaller raises may only partly meet funding goals, experts say.

india_trends.title: EU’s CBAM expansion to impact Indian engg, auto parts, machinery exports: GTRI
india_trends.summary: India's exports of engineering goods, auto parts, and machinery to Europe face potential carbon tax hikes as the EU expands its Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism. india_trends.title: RBI asks state oil refiners to curb spot dollar buying, sources say
india_trends.summary: India's central bank is taking action to support the rupee. State-run oil refiners are being asked to use a special credit line for dollar needs instead of buying on the spot market. This move aims to reduce pressure on the Indian currency. india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold up $38/oz, silver rises $1.6 on US-Iran peace hopes and weak dollar
india_trends.summary: On 16 April, precious metal prices increased as hopes for US-Iran negotiations grew, supported by a weaker dollar. Gold futures reached $4,861, and silver hit $81. Easing inflation worries also contributed to positive market sentiment for bullion.

india_trends.summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung visits India from April 19-21. The visit prioritizes shipbuilding, especially LNG tankers, under the 'Make in India' initiative.
